title: Imagine
wikitext:
[]: Imagine... Post by EVA Unit 01 » Tue Jul 26, 2011 2:25 pm Imagine that everytime in the series where Gendo told Fuyutski to take care of everything, he retreatred to his office to build an EVA model kit. LMAO

[]: Post by Someone » Wed Jul 27, 2011 7:39 am Okay.....

[]: Post by Korgan » Wed Jul 27, 2011 8:00 am Are you high?

[]: Post by EVA Unit 01 » Wed Jul 27, 2011 8:05 am Lol, well I thought it was funny lol

[]: Post by symbv » Wed Jul 27, 2011 8:17 am I am sure it is good material for an Eva 4-koma manga...

[]: Post by EVA Unit 01 » Wed Jul 27, 2011 8:30 am Well me and my buddy always come up with stupid little ''What ifs'' about the series. I like the funny things like Gendo always disappearing. Makes you wonder if the stress is so much that he has to take a dump. Speaking of which, What if you're piloting eva and you have to take a dump? If you let that in the LCL wouldn't that more or less be toxic waste floating in your Air/breating juice?

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:13 am THIS THREAD SUCKS [/Eva Monkey]
